creator: kempe@lysator.liu.se
text:
I applied the 2.11 patch on 2023Q4 and the functionality I use worked fine. I could study and browse my cards and check my statistics.

One thing I noticed is that the name of the port is changed to mnemosyne_proj in the patch causing a conflict with the current mnemosyne package that had to be manually deinstalled. I'm not sure if this is intentional.
